---
title: "test_mimir_remediation.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_mimir_remediation.py"
loc: 35
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.83
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.19
---

## Intent
The `test_mimir_remediation.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on project_root, test_vector_search_parity, test_scenario_generation, test_odin_adventure_init. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via project_root, test_vector_search_parity, test_scenario_generation, test_odin_adventure_init. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.main](file://src.games.odin_protocol.main)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `project_root`
- `test_vector_search_parity`
- `test_scenario_generation`
- `test_odin_adventure_init`
